note: Point-in-time validation, not recomputed on the weekly pipeline schedule. Re-run nigeria/analysis/placebo_test.py and conley_se.py manually and update this file to refresh.

placebo_test.description: Instrument swapped for a >=500km-distant district's; a real effect should shrink toward zero and lose significance, since there's no physical wind-transport channel at that distance.

conley_se.description: Spatial-correlation-robust standard errors (econtools SHAC estimator, triangle kernel), allowing residual correlation across province boundaries rather than only within them.

summary: Riots and Strategic Developments both survive the placebo test (effect disappears/flips sign when the instrument is replaced with a physically implausible one) and Conley spatial-correlation SEs (remain significant, some even more so, across three bandwidths). Protests does not survive the placebo test as cleanly. Two of two robustness checks support the two headline categories.
